use_cases: Creating animated glitch effects as landing page backgrounds
Adding chromatic aberration and scanline aesthetics to creative portfolios
Building dynamic visual overlays for gaming or music-related websites
Implementing WebGL shader effects for tech-forward brand experiences
Designing animated hero backgrounds for media and entertainment sites
ai_summary: A Three.js WebGL shader component that renders animated digital glitch effects including chromatic aberration (RGB shift), scanlines, and film grain. Features customizable parameters for glitch intensity, RGB separation, scanline density, and base color. Uses GLSL fragment shaders for real-time GPU-accelerated visual effects with continuous time-based animation.
